query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE status IN ('pending', 'passive_recon', 'discovering', 'analyzing', 'scoring', 'recommending') GROUP BY status
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2k2SuDvpDb6F44q.5f28f8362a85 --database VmWWcXQYZJYuALRdNNvsC2 --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE status IN ('pending', 'passive_recon', 'discovering', 'analyzing', 'scoring', 'recommending') GROUP BY status
